name: Berry Teatime Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease twelve 2 1/2-inch muffin cups or line with paper baking cups; set aside.
2. In a large bowl stir together flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Make a well in the center.
3. In a small bowl combine the egg, milk, brown sugar, oil, and vanilla. Add to flour mixture all at once. Stir just until moistened (batter should be lumpy).
4. Gently fold berries into batter.
5. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups, filling each 3/4 full.
6. Bake in a 400°F oven for 16 to 18 minutes for 2 1/2-inch muffins (10 to 12 minutes for 1 3/4-inch muffins) or until golden.
7. Cool in muffin cups on a wire rack for 5 minutes; remove muffins from cups.
8. Makes twelve 2 1/2-inch muffins.
Recipe from "Old-Fashioned Favorites from Clabber Girl".
